title: Picture
text: First try to draw a triangle given the description and see which sides and angles are given to us.

title: Law of Cosines
text: How could we use the law of cosines to find the length of the third side? Remember that the law of cosines is $$c^2=a^2+b^2+2\operatorname{abcos}\left(X\right)$$, X is the given angle between a and $$b$$ and $$cos(X)=\frac{a^2+b^2-c^2}{2ab}$$

title: Side
text: Which side length are we solving for?

title: Area
text: How can we find the area after we have found the $$3$$ side lengths? (Use Heron's formula)
